backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores contact form inquiries in a Set, exposing functions to submit, retrieve, and delete inquiries with basic validation.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that company name, phone number, and address were updated across Navigation, Footer, Contact page, and index.html.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, briefly describing the purpose of each component, page, hook, and config file.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file defining Tailwind base layers and OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point setting the page title and meta description to 'Insight Research and Communications' with a reference to the React app root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router route tree with routes for home, services, service detail, research methodologies, research types, market analysis, and contact, all wrapped in Layout.
Two-column section component displaying a category label, title, description, and a list of analysis items alongside a visual panel with icons and a geo-dot pattern.
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: Controlled contact form with name, email, company, and message fields, client-side validation, backend submission via mutation hook, and a success confirmation state.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the 'Insight Research and Communications' brand, contact details (+91 9353172674, Bangalore India 560001), and organized navigation link columns.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section component for the landing page displaying a headline, subtext, CTA buttons linking to services and contact pages, and key statistics with icons.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout wrapper that composes Navigation, a main content area, and Footer around child components.
Card component displaying a research methodology (qualitative or quantitative) with a title, description, and a grid of named methods, styled differently based on type.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with a logo, desktop nav links with active-state highlighting, a 'Get Started' CTA, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/ResearchTypeCard: Card component that displays a numbered research type with an icon, description, and a bulleted list of key points.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCard.tsx: Linked card component that navigates to a service detail page, showing an icon, title, description, and optional tags.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useSubmitContactForm mutation hook that calls the backend actor's submitContactForm method and invalidates the inquiries query on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defines a dark navy + gold OKLCH color palette with custom utility classes for gradients, patterns, and hover effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page displaying company contact info (email, phone, location, response time) alongside a ContactForm component and a 'What to Expect' process list.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page rendering a Hero section, a grid of six featured ServiceCards, a 'Why Choose Us' checklist, and links to other pages using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/pages/MarketAnalysis.tsx: Market Analysis page presenting three alternating AnalysisSection components (Market Trends, Customer Analysis, Competitive Landscape) plus a capabilities grid with icons.
frontend/src/pages/ResearchMethodologies: Research Methodologies page displaying qualitative and quantitative method lists inside two MethodologyCard components, with a header and introductory text.
frontend/src/pages/ResearchTypes.tsx: Research Types page rendering six numbered ResearchTypeCard components covering Primary, Secondary, Qualitative, Quantitative, Descriptive, and Exploratory research.
frontend/src/pages/ServiceDetail.tsx: Defines a detailed service page component that renders per-service data (benefits, process steps, deliverables) for six market research services, using route params to select the correct entry from a static `serviceData` record.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Renders a grid listing of all six market research services using `ServiceCard` components, with a styled page header and static service metadata including icons and tags.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom navy and gold color palettes (oklch), display/body font families, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state (version 5) for the 'Insight Research and Communications' website, listing implemented features such as homepage, services, methodologies, contact form, and company contact details.
